summary: Root Graffiticode language — the base functional language every dialect inherits from. Evaluates a closed program and renders the result as JSON.
in_scope: Arithmetic, string manipulation, list construction and traversal, ranges
Records and tags; key lookup (get/set) with tag/string/number key semantics
Lambdas, let-bound helpers, pattern matching on numbers/lists/pairs/records/tags
Comparison operators (eq / ne / gt / lt / ge / le) and conditionals
Referencing an upstream task's output via data / use
out_of_scope: Domain-specific vocabulary or rendering (assessments, spreadsheets, charts, maps, diagrams, boards) — those belong to dialects that inherit from L0000
Any rendered UI beyond the base JSON view
Stateful or streaming operations and side effects
External I/O (HTTP, file, database) beyond the compile-time data/use mechanism
